:::: columns
::: {.column width="30%"}
![](images/james.png){.staff-image}
:::

::: {.column width="70%"}
**James Clawson** [(he/him)]{.faint} <br> Data Science Mentor

- Chicago, IL
- literary research using R
- Posit Academy since 2022

:::
::::

::: notes
I'm James Clawson, a Data Science Mentor with Posit Academy. I'm in Chicago, finishing up my first summer in the city. Before moving here, I was an English professor in Louisiana at Grambling State University, where I also taught in and coordinated the data analytics program. I use R in my research, applying text analytics methods to learn and make arguments about literature. ✻
:::
